title: Adrià Julià Lundgren
body:
## UX Engineer

[What is ***UX Engineer*** according to Google?](https://uxe.withgoogle.com/)

*Web UX/UI Designer & Front End Developer* -> **Web developer and interface designer with extensive professional experience in web and multimedia development.**

As a UX engineer, my work combines user experience principles with development and programming tasks:

- **Plan and design web pages and applications**: I use UX principles to create digital products. This can mean using sketches, prototypes, and design tools to create blueprints of what a web page or app should look like.
- **Program the front-end:** UX engineers are different from UX designers because we know how to program. I use front-end programming languages ​​such as HTML, CSS, or JavaScript to create layouts, interactive functionality, or execute other design ideas.
- **Collaborate with UX and Development teams:** As a professional with both design and programming skills, I often act as a bridge between the two teams. I can work with designers, front-end or back-end programmers, and copywriters to develop products. I can also perform user testing, A/B testing and other forms of research in collaboration with the UX team.

* * *

## I develop your website with a complete service, which includes domain registration, hosting, design, registration in search engines, etc., satisfying all your needs until you get a project that fits you.

* * *

You can consult the latest developments **[here](/portfolio/ "Portfolio")**,    
my [**Curriculum Vitae**](http://xarop.com/cv/)  
and my professional profile on **[Linkedin](http://www.linkedin.com/in/xarop)**.
